lines.speaker: Bentamir
lines.text: Do you mind? You're in my home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, should I have knocked?

lines.speaker: Bentamir
lines.text: We can't all live in plush houses, you know. But that doesn't mean us mining dwarves don't work hard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do you do your mining?

lines.speaker: Bentamir
lines.text: Normally the coal mine to the north. We need a lot of coal to keep our steam engines going, you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I do a bit of mining there as well?

lines.speaker: Bentamir
lines.text: I'm not sure, but as long as no one notices I don't think anyone is going to care.
